info.name: Event Scheduler v5 (Production-ready)
info.description:
Full end-to-end test collection for Event Scheduler API v5.

## Token Refresh (automatic)
Set `firebase_api_key`, `admin_email`, `admin_password`, `member_email`, `member_password` in the environment. The collection-level pre-request script calls Firebase REST API and refreshes tokens every 55 minutes automatically.

## Run Order
1. Health  2. Auth  3. Events  4. Invitations  5. AI  6. Teardown

## Manual fallback
If firebase_api_key is unavailable, paste tokens directly into `admin_token` / `member_token` in the environment (valid for 1 hour).

body.raw: {"text":"Schedule a team retrospective next Monday at 2pm for 90 minutes in the conference room"}

item.name: Teardown
item.description: Clean up all resources created during the test run. Safe to re-run.

exec: pm.test('message not found',function(){pm.expect(j.message.toLowerCase()).to.satisfy(function(m){return m.includes('not found')||m.includes('does not exist');});});
